name: Business Cards
desc: 90x55mm. From everyday 350gsm to thick NV Velvet with Spot UV and metallic foil.
seo: Business Cards Sunshine Coast - Instant Online Pricing
faqs: What is NV Velvet?
NV Velvet is a luxurious soft-touch laminate over thick 450gsm artboard. It feels like suede and makes colours pop. Add Spot UV for glossy highlights.
How fast can I get my cards?
Standard turnaround is 3-5 business days plus delivery. Next-day and same-day production are available on this product - select your speed above.
Do I see a proof before printing?
Always. A digital proof lands in your inbox and nothing prints until you approve it.

name: NV Velvet Business Cards
desc: Soft-touch velvet laminate over 450gsm artboard. The card people remember.
seo: NV Velvet Business Cards Australia
specs: Colour: CMYK, 300dpi. Supply foil/UV as spot layer
faqs: Why do these feel so good?
The NV (velvet) laminate is a micro-textured soft-touch film over thick artboard - it feels like suede and resists fingerprints.
Can I add foil?
Yes - gold, silver and rose metallic foil, supplied as a separate spot layer in your artwork. Ask if you need help setting it up.
liveNote: Want Spot UV or metallic foil over the velvet? Ask for a fast quote →

name: Flyers
desc: DL to A3 on stocks from 130gsm to 350gsm. Letterbox-ready and event-proof.
seo: Flyer Printing Sunshine Coast
faqs: Which stock for letterbox drops?
130-150gsm gloss keeps unit cost low for volume. Go 250gsm+ for handouts that need to feel substantial.
Can you organise distribution?
We can connect you with local letterbox distribution partners - ask via chat.

name: Brochures
desc: Half fold, tri fold, Z fold and gate fold on premium stocks.
seo: Brochure Printing Sunshine Coast
specs: Supply flat size with fold marks
faqs: Which fold should I pick?
Tri fold suits menus and service lists; half fold gives bigger panels for imagery; gate fold makes an impact for premium offers.

name: Postcards
desc: Direct mail that stands out. A6 to A5 on thick stocks.
seo: Postcard Printing Australia
specs: Leave address side 60% uncoated for mailing
faqs: Can you laminate one side only?
Yes - matt laminate the image side and leave the mailing side writable.

name: Letterheads
desc: Offset quality on premium uncoated and laser-safe stocks.
seo: Letterhead Printing Australia
specs: Laser-safe stocks available for office printers
faqs: Will it work in my office printer?
Yes - choose the laser-safe stock and it runs through any office laser or inkjet without smudging.

name: Envelopes
desc: Printed DL to C4, plain face or window, any volume.
seo: Printed Envelopes Australia
specs: Print: full colour or 1-2 spot colours
faqs: What's the minimum order?
500 for printed envelopes; smaller runs are possible digitally - ask for a quote.

name: With Compliments Slips
desc: The finishing touch for your stationery suite. DL size to match your letterhead.
seo: With Compliments Slips Printing
faqs: Can you match my letterhead design?
Yes - send your letterhead file and we'll adapt it, or order both together and save.

name: Loyalty Cards
desc: Keep customers coming back. Business card size with stamp grids or numbering.
seo: Loyalty Card Printing
faqs: Which stock takes stamps best?
Uncoated or matt cello one side - the back stays raw so ink stamps dry instantly.

name: Presentation Folders
desc: Gloss, matt or velvet with business card slits and capacity spines.
seo: Presentation Folder Printing Australia
faqs: Do folders come flat or made up?
Your choice - flat packs save freight, made-up saves your time.

name: Menus
desc: Flat, folded or laminated for table service. Spill-proof options for venues.
seo: Menu Printing Sunshine Coast
specs: Celloglaze or full lamination for wipe-clean
faqs: What survives a busy venue?
350gsm with matt laminate both sides and round corners - wipeable and won't fray.

name: Greeting Cards
desc: Folded cards for retail, events and corporate Christmas lists.
seo: Greeting Card Printing Australia
faqs: Can you supply envelopes?
Yes - plain or printed envelopes to suit every card size.

name: Saddle Stitched Booklets
desc: 8-64 pages, self cover or plus cover. Catalogues, programs and magazines.
seo: Booklet Printing Australia
specs: Supply as single pages, not spreads
faqs: How many pages can saddle stitch hold?
Up to about 64 pages depending on stock. Beyond that, go perfect bound.
Self cover or plus cover?
Self cover uses the same stock throughout; plus cover wraps heavier stock around lighter text pages.

name: Perfect Bound Books
desc: Square spine, bookshop finish. Annual reports, look books and manuals.
seo: Perfect Bound Book Printing Australia
specs: Allow spine width in cover artwork
faqs: What's the minimum page count?
Roughly 40 pages so the spine has enough thickness to bind cleanly.

name: Wiro Bound Booklets
desc: Lay-flat manuals, workbooks and calendars with metal wire binding.
seo: Wiro Bound Booklet Printing
specs: Optional clear cover and board back
faqs: Why choose wiro?
Anything people write in - training manuals, workbooks, planners - should lay flat. Wiro does that.

name: Invoice Books (NCR)
desc: Carbonless duplicate and triplicate books, numbered and perforated.
seo: NCR Invoice Book Printing Australia
faqs: Can you match my current book?
Send a photo of your existing book and we'll match layout and numbering sequence.

name: Notepads
desc: Branded pads, glued head, 25-100 sheets. Desk real estate for your brand.
seo: Notepad Printing Australia
faqs: What sheet count works best?
50 sheets balances thickness and cost for giveaways; 100 for serious desk pads.

name: Calendars
desc: Wall and desk calendars, wiro bound. Twelve months of brand visibility.
seo: Calendar Printing Australia
faqs: When should I order for Christmas?
Artwork approved by mid-November guarantees pre-Christmas delivery.

name: Corflute Signs
desc: Real estate, builders and event boards on 3mm or 5mm corflute, any size.
seo: Corflute Signs Sunshine Coast
faqs: How long do they last outside?
12-24 months in Queensland sun. UV inks resist fading; the board itself is weatherproof.

name: A-Frames
desc: Metal A-frames with replaceable corflute or ACM inserts. Footpath workhorses.
seo: A-Frame Signs Australia
faqs: Can I replace just the inserts?
Yes - keep the frame, swap the message. Inserts are a fraction of the full price.

name: Aluminium Composite Signs
desc: Premium rigid ACM signage that stays flat and lasts years outdoors.
seo: Aluminium Composite Signs Australia
faqs: ACM vs corflute?
ACM is rigid, premium and lasts 5+ years - the right call for shopfronts and permanent signage. Corflute wins on price for short campaigns.

name: Safety Signs
desc: Compliant site and workplace signage to AS 1319, stock or custom.
seo: Safety Signs Australia
faqs: Are your signs compliant?
Yes - standard designs follow AS 1319. Send your site requirements and we'll spec the right signs.

name: Posters
desc: Offset and wide format posters, A2 to billboard scale.
seo: Poster Printing Sunshine Coast
faqs: Indoor or outdoor?
Paper stocks for indoors; synthetic for anything that might get wet.

name: Stickers & Labels
desc: Die-cut shapes, rolls and sheets. Indoor, outdoor and machine-apply.
seo: Sticker Printing Australia
faqs: What's the difference between kiss cut and die cut?
Kiss cut leaves the backing intact (easy peeling on sheets); die cut cuts through everything for individual stickers.

name: Vehicle Magnets
desc: Turn the ute into a billboard. Heavy-duty magnetic material, rounded corners.
seo: Vehicle Magnet Printing Australia
faqs: Will they fly off at highway speed?
Not when fitted to a clean, flat steel panel. We include care instructions with every set.

name: Pull Up Banners
desc: Economy to premium bases with vivid print. Includes padded carry bag.
seo: Pull Up Banners Sunshine Coast
specs: Bleed: none, but keep text 100mm from bottom
faqs: Economy or premium base?
Premium bases are heavier, more stable, and survive years of events. Economy suits one-off campaigns.
What's in the box?
Banner fitted to base, pole and padded carry bag - ready to stand in 30 seconds.

name: Teardrop Flags
desc: Single or double sided knitted polyester with spike, cross or water bases.
seo: Teardrop Flags Australia
specs: Single side reads reversed on back
Base options: spike, cross, water, wall
faqs: Single or double sided?
Single sided shows a mirror image on the back and flies lighter. Double sided reads correctly both ways but needs more wind.

name: Outdoor Vinyl Banners
desc: Hemmed and eyeletted heavy-duty vinyl, any size, built for weather.
seo: Vinyl Banner Printing Australia
specs: Wind slits available for exposed sites
faqs: What size can you print?
Any size - large banners are welded in sections with no visible join at viewing distance.

name: Fence Mesh Banners
desc: Construction site wraps that let wind through. Builders' favourite billboard.
seo: Fence Mesh Printing Australia
specs: Standard drops to suit temp fencing
faqs: How do I fix it to temporary fencing?
Cable ties through the eyelets, top and bottom every panel. We supply the ties.

name: Media Walls
desc: Straight or curved backdrops for events, launches and step-and-repeats.
seo: Media Walls Australia
faqs: How long to set up?
Two people, ten minutes, no tools. The fabric zips over the frame like a pillowcase.

name: Marquees
desc: Printed canopies, walls and flags for markets and events. 2.4m to 6m.
seo: Printed Marquees Australia
faqs: What wind rating are the frames?
Commercial hex frames handle typical market conditions when pegged/weighted - we include weight recommendations.

name: Standees & Cut Outs
desc: Life-size (and larger) cardboard and corflute cut-outs with strut backs.
seo: Standee Printing Australia
faqs: What file do you need?
A high-res photo (300dpi at half scale or better) with a clear subject - we handle the cut path.

name: Printed Tablecloths
desc: Fitted or throw-style, full colour dye-sublimation. Machine washable.
seo: Printed Tablecloths Australia
faqs: Will the print fade in the wash?
No - dye-sublimation embeds ink in the fabric. Cold wash, hang dry.

name: Exhibition Displays
desc: Complete expo kits: walls, counters, lighting and shipping cases.
seo: Exhibition Display Systems Australia
faqs: Can you design the whole stand?
Yes - send your floor plan and brand assets and we'll design, print and pack the lot.
